name: Transocean Ltd.
description: Transocean Ltd. is a leading international provider of offshore contract drilling services for oil and gas wells. Specializing in technically demanding sectors, the company operates one of the world's most versatile fleets of ultra-deepwater and harsh-environment drilling rigs. With a global presence, Transocean focuses on delivering safe, efficient, and reliable drilling solutions to energy companies worldwide. The company is committed to operational excellence, sustainability, and technological innovation, consistently maintaining its position as a premier contractor in the offshore drilling industry while navigating complex environments to meet the evolving energy needs of its diverse client base.
